canonical_docs.post_i7_program: C:\work\Lumberjacks\docs\roadmap\valheim-volunteer-roadmap.json (living roadmap, M-series milestones) + C:\work\Lumberjacks\docs\plan-m1-strict-admission.md (active M1 plan + numbered risk register). The I1..I7 ladder below is history; the program's present tense lives there.

needs_derek: M1 STAGE 3: DNS is DONE - comfy-p7.duckdns.org -> reserved static 8.231.129.249 (comfy 29326eb; survives VM stop/start, no updater needed) - and 80/443 are open (comfy 2765ff9). The ONLY remaining human input is the ACME contact address, deliberately kept out of the repo: it goes in /etc/comfy-p7/environment on the VM at the next boot, alongside the stage-3 cut + deploy. Stage 3 (mod TLS + authenticated identity, fail-closed) and stage 4 (one-use bootstrap) remain BUILT + COMMITTED, UNDEPLOYED, shipping OFF by design.

DECISION owed (risk 12, rebuild-to-verify) - NARROWED TO THE MOD ONLY on 2026-07-19. The Gateway half is CLOSED: three --no-cache builds proved Game.Gateway.dll/.pdb byte-identical across two different HEADs, because .dockerignore excludes .git and the build stage has no repository to query, so the image payload is the reproducibility unit and bin/Release is advisory (Lumberjacks c34b255, docs/decision-release-reproducibility-risk-12.md). The MOD half is still OPEN and unchanged: it is still built on the Windows host with full git visibility, so the .NET 8 SDK embeds git HEAD in the mod PDB, the DLL hash moves with every commit, and a cut built pre-commit can never be rebuilt from its release commit. Pick one: pin EnableSourceControlManagerQueries=false in the mod csproj (hash attests source alone), OR reorder the cut commit-first-build-second (keeps embedded provenance). Root cause proven 2026-07-18 (comfy 554488d, Lumberjacks 909315b).
OPTIONAL backlog: M1 stage 4 self-serve bootstrap re-issue (an expired bootstrap currently strands a volunteer until an admin revoke + fresh invite).
next_derek_touchpoint: M-SERIES ACTIVE - the post-I7 program lives in the Lumberjacks living roadmap (docs/roadmap/) and plan-m1-strict-admission.md; this file keeps the I1..I7 record. M0 (frozen reproducible release + evidence, promotion drill) CLOSED 2026-07-16. M1 (strict admission) ACTIVE: stages 1-2 closed; gate 3 closed LIVE 2026-07-17 (strict roster flipped, a real join proved it); stages 3-4 built + committed, UNDEPLOYED, shipping OFF. P7 cutover state: lumberjacks-primary since 2026-07-15 (all-prefab redirect, 100% coverage - evidence fieldlab/evidence/p7-primary-v1-authoritative-zdo-20260715-v0527.md). 2026-07-18 autonomous session: (1) release-cut pass path PROVEN via rehearsal cut m1-rehearsal-20260718-r1 - first pass verdict the identity check ever produced; (2) cut early-ship defect FIXED - the mod csproj CopyAssembly convenience was landing release-id DLLs on the live OMEN client BEFORE the identity check ran (comfy 877ff11); (3) risk 12 clone-vs-worktree mystery SOLVED - the SDK embeds git HEAD in the PDB (comfy 554488d, LJ 909315b) - fix is now a decision, see needs_derek. 2026-07-19/20 sessions: (1) risk 12 DECIDED for the Gateway - the image payload is the reproducibility unit, proven by three --no-cache builds byte-identical across two HEADs (Lumberjacks c34b255); the mod half stays open and is the only risk-12 decision still owed; (2) the release-cut identity check now verifies the release id from the image that ships rather than a local DLL that does not (comfy 1bc7478, Lumberjacks 26c6f2b); (3) Importance-approved ZDOs now carry through Lumberjacks with correlated acceptance evidence and the integration architecture is documented (comfy dd78061/54b1a4e/3c74815); (4) M2 (boring, reversible guest package) moved queued -> active alongside M1 - both are active in the living roadmap (43 commit notes); (5) BOTH REPOS PUSHED and in sync with origin on 2026-07-20, so the standing push item is retired. NEXT IN-PERSON: set the ACME contact in /etc/comfy-p7/environment at next boot (DNS already done: comfy-p7.duckdns.org -> static 8.231.129.249), then the stage 3/4 cut + deploy and the owed live verifications (Gateway stopped => strict refuses; the 2-dark rows on the wire; https end to end; plaintext-credential capture check; priority-drain baseline re-run). Stage 1 of the M4-unification plan is clear to run at the start of the next window: start the VM, New-GatewayReleaseCut.ps1, Phases 1-7 - it closes F1 live for the first time. P7 VM is STOPPED between windows (confirmed TERMINATED against the GCP API 2026-07-20) - start it for the next window. VM is n2-highmem-2 (2 vCPU / 16 GB) after the deliberate cost downsize, NOT the n2-highmem-8 that several older artifacts still record.

trust.rule: Nothing after commit c196f88 (I0 map) counts without >=2 independent non-doc sources.

headlines.text: P7/I7 CLOSED - one client fully on Lumberjacks, proven in ONE clean single-window capture (2026-07-12, mod 0.5.18, GCP comfy-lumberjacks-p7). All four rungs armed SIMULTANEOUSLY and passed live in one full window with a clean probe stop, no desync/crash/OOM (window i7-w6): I5 handshake Lumberjacks-decided ACCEPT->steady state; I2 pin held_with_negative_control (25 pinned/49 holds/15606 pass-through); I3 redirect receipts_match_no_loss (3474==3474, missing 0, dup 0); I4 injection rendered_with_lumberjacks_owner (owner 5497853135698, 90 polls/0 err); client clean; save-integrity intact within tolerance across the disarm reload (structural anchors exact, ZDOs -2/0.00002%, targets -1 = benign player+reload churn, honestly NOT composition corruption - the composition persists no ZDO state, proven byte-identical P3-P6). The weeks of prior clips were ALL am4 HOST OOM (oom_kill=9), eliminated by migrating the dedicated-server role to a 62 GiB GCP VM (~48 GiB free). Repeatability: two independent GCP windows (i7-gcp-w1 corroborating + i7-w6 full capture). Evidence evidence/i7-w6/ + i7-gcp-w1/, four independent non-doc sources (server log + gateway JSON + mod jsonl + MCP gates). The full ladder I1..I7 is now proven.

P6/I5 CLOSED - the FIRST LIVE Lumberjacks-fronted admission (2026-07-11, mod 0.5.18). A real Valheim client held ~105s in-world past spawn via a Lumberjacks-decided ACCEPT (real AddPeer over the Steam socket), and a Lumberjacks-side ban flipped the same client to a code-8 reject that vanilla am4 would have accepted - the fronting proof. Save-integrity exact (ZDOS delta 0). Three independent streams: the interceptor's own decision log, vanilla 'New peer connected'/'Got character ZDOID', and the client 'Banned' screen. Honest scope: password/ticket delegated to vanilla (real crypto); 2 of 6 codes surfaced live, full battery is the 28/28 headless loopback.
Nothing was deleted - all 28 commands, full MCP tree, zero orphaned work in git. The 'tooling cut' was a workflow BYPASS; fix is a wiring job (P1).
I1 PASS is real: connected session, both ZDO funnels reachable & legible (1,154 recv / 3,846 send, all uid/owner legible). Four independent sources.
'SendZDOs is inlined - settled' was never measured (counters were verifier fallback defaults). Re-measured at P2 with finite autostop. CreateSyncList seam is proven & safe either way.

P2 steps 6-8 re-verified for real 2026-07-09 22:48: server + client counters archived via the project's own verifier (not hand-typed), SendZDOs postfix fires in both directions (2247/2288 calls) - the inlining question is settled, not assumed. Superseded the unbacked a1e2608 claim.

P2 CLOSED (2026-07-10): airtight I1 + repeatable connected baseline. Second green run gated both sides; signed client+server baseline packets (client frame p95 16.7ms locked-60 HIGH; server recv 2126/send 2249, parseErr 0). god/fly autopilot safeguard live. Caught + excluded: mod rtt_ms/jitter_ms are a bogus ZRpc heartbeat sawtooth (real network RTT 2-4ms).

I2 observe capture (2026-07-10, mod 0.5.9, observe-only): the ZDO ownership funnel is patch-reachable -- 140 SetOwner changes in a 150s walk, all bumping OwnerRevision (inlining risk retired). Caveat #2 confirmed + quantified: 389 SetOwnerInternal remote-applies (169 at revision 0) the pin must cover. Zero gameplay change; live server-side, archived w/ sha256. Settles I2 before any behaviour-changing pin code.

P3 ownership PIN built + deployed + armed (mod 0.5.10, 2026-07-10): the first BEHAVIOUR-CHANGING rung. Two scoped Harmony prefixes skip the vanilla transfer on <=25 auto-captured ZDOs (SetOwner in ReleaseNearbyZDOS scope + SetOwnerInternal in RPC_ZDOData scope); patches attach-verified on am4 (Awake 'Telemetry scaffold ready' past CreateAndPatchAll, clean build 0 warnings). Grounded on the live decompiled assembly with 2 caveat corrections: the revision-race has a hole at RPC_ZDOData:842-844 (so guard SetOwnerInternal directly), and ZDO ownership is runtime-only (Load resets owner=0) so the pin cannot corrupt the save. Rollback: ownershipPinEnabled=false. ONE launch+join runs the gates.

P3 CLOSED - I2 ownership PIN gates PASS (mod 0.5.10, 2026-07-10, first behaviour-changing rung). Authoritative window: 25 ZDOs pinned, 55 holds on BOTH funnels (34 SetOwner + 21 SetOwnerInternal), 262 pass-through transfers as the live negative control (cross-confirmed by the observe seam), save-integrity PASS with the pin engaged. Held hands-free, server-side, rollback-gated, touching <=25 of 9.15M ZDOs. The 21 SetOwnerInternal holds vindicate guarding that path directly (the revision-race alone would have leaked them). Evidence fieldlab/evidence/i2-pin/ sha256 ebeefeb6.

P4 runway built headlessly (2026-07-10 evening): I3 redirect designed against a FRESH ZDOMan/ZDO decompile (seam = CreateSyncList postfix @ Priority.High; suppress-with-ack replicates ZDOMan:767/780 bookkeeping so suppressed-count == what native would have sent; send path writes no persisted state -> inherits pin save-safety). Mod 0.5.11 built 0-warnings + deployed both sides UNARMED (am4 boot-verified; empty prefab allowlist REFUSES to arm - fail-safe). Lumberjacks receive endpoint smoke-tested incl. deliberate seq-gap + duplicate detection; am4-container->OMEN:4000 proven; one-call MCP gate valheim_zdo_redirect_gate live. Rollback rehearsal designed INTO the window (activeSeconds 90 < probe 150s). One launch+join runs the gates.

I2 repeatability CLOSED (2026-07-10 06:00 PDT, window A of the P4 gate session): 2nd fully authoritative pin window on a fresh join - held_with_negative_control, 25 pinned, 232 holds (222 SetOwner + 10 SetOwnerInternal, both funnels again), 280 pass-through live negative control, clean 150s auto-stop with the join timed to a fresh updater cycle (the clock practice worked - no clipping), save-integrity EXACT across the post-window save->reload. Ran on 0.5.11 with pin code carried unchanged = mechanism-across-builds repeatability, recorded honestly. Evidence evidence/i2-repeat/ (b375d9ec/d08fa974). P3's one soft spot is closed; DECISIONS-PENDING is empty.

P4/I3 outbound REDIRECT CLOSED (2026-07-10 12:02 PDT, window i3-w4, mod 0.5.12): the 3rd behaviour-changing rung. receipts_match_no_loss AUTHORITATIVE - 1303 conifer ZDOs (FirTree_small 559 + FirTree 406 + Pinetree_01 338) removed from ZDOMan.CreateSyncList's toSync before native serialization and delivered to the Lumberjacks gateway with distinct_seq 1..1303 contiguous, missing_seq 0, duplicates 0, ack_failures 0, dropped 0; client stable; rollback auto-disarm at 90s inside the 150s probe; save-integrity EXACT across save->reload (redirect writes no persisted state, same class as the I2 pin). Two hidden bugs found first: (1) the client auto-walk only re-arms on a fresh relaunch (run-once flag) so a menu rejoin runs no walk; (2) SERVER-ONLY Mono defect - WebRequest.Create throws 'The URI prefix is not recognized' on the dedicated server, so i3-w3 suppressed 88 but posted 0 and dropped them all (the live monitor's supp=0 was a disk-flush red herring; Lumberjacks receipts are the real-time truth). Fixed with a raw TcpClient POST (0.5.12). Target ground-truthed from the world-save DuckDB (9376,544 conifer stand, 6447m from spawn, floated Y=105 over y79 terrain) after telemetry proved to carry no tree data. Evidence evidence/i3-redirect/ (redirect-send 6ed610ef, receipts 7bc6ee7c).

P5/I4 inbound injection CLOSED (2026-07-10/11, window i4-w6, mod 0.5.15) - the 5th behaviour-changing rung. A synthetic 'Wood' ZDO staged by the Lumberjacks gateway was polled by the OMEN client (90 polls, 0 poll errors), applied through the live RPC_ZDOData receive funnel, and rendered client-side: received 1 / applied 1 / rendered 1 / rejected 0 / duplicates 0, uid 5497853135698:1, post-apply readback owner=5497853135698. The one-call gate requires BOTH the client rendered row AND the Lumberjacks rendered ack with owner-match, and returned rendered_with_lumberjacks_owner. Honest caveats kept off the 'confirmed' pile: injection is CLIENT-ONLY (nothing persists server-side, so the save delta of 0 is expected, not a strong test), 'rendered in-world' is client-self-reported (the gateway ack is downstream of the client's own POST, not an independent observer), and only the arm-time save baseline snapshot is archived (the delta-0 check ran live at gate, not as an archived before/after pair). Clean failure trail first: i4-w2 poll-parser bug (Mono JsonUtility) -> gateway-shape parser; i4-w4/w5 ZPackage read-cursor (EndOfStreamException) -> SetPos(0). Evidence fieldlab/evidence/i4-injection/ (apply-jsonl 2d4e9d19, gateway-status 5e284717, save-baseline b6d444a5).

P6/I5 steps 1-4 built + verified HEADLESS (2026-07-10 eve): the Lumberjacks handshake responder replicates Funnel 5's ordered connection gate, proven in a no-game loopback - 28/28 xUnit + HTTP driver green vs the live gateway, verdict handshake_satisfied requiring all SIX distinct gate-check labels (both code-8 cases, blacklist vs ticket, kept distinct). Contract grounded in TWO decompile sources (I0 map + fresh ZNet 0.221.12 re-decompile; netver 36, gate 3/8/8/9/6/7, max-players literal 10). HONEST SCOPE: a LOGICAL decision proof (scope=logical_headless_no_live_addpeer), NOT a live Valheim AddPeer - the real client-in-world >=30s gate against the Lumberjacks-fronted peer is P6 step 6-7, still pending (Derek's first touchpoint). Reviewed cross-check by a second agent hardened the naming/gate/version-path before commit. Commits comfy 56e5178 + Lumberjacks 935095b; evidence i5-handshake/ sha256 d705e346.

infra.name: GCP P7 valheim server (comfy-lumberjacks-p7)
infra.detail: PRIMARY P7 server. VM STOPPED (TERMINATED, re-verified against the GCP API 2026-07-20) between windows - the ordered shutdown lane stops Valheim before the VM (comfy ea369a2). Start for a window: gcloud compute instances start comfy-lumberjacks-p7 (project lumberjacks-exp-20260711-djc, us-west1-b, public 8.231.129.249). Runs release m1-clean-20260717-r1 under the durable env image pin (NOT the M0 release - LJ c51ccee); Gateway state lumberjacks-primary since the 2026-07-15 cutover. n2-highmem-2, 16 GiB (2 vCPU; deliberate cost downsize from n2-highmem-8 - confirmed against the GCP API 2026-07-20, do not re-flag as an OOM risk). Boot disk 40 GB + state disk 150 GB, both pd-balanced (API-confirmed 2026-07-20). Reach via the comfy-p7 IAP alias + set-gcp-p7-target.ps1; IAP ssh works FOREGROUND only. Infra Terraform root infra/gcp/p7/.

infra.name: am4 valheim server
infra.detail: RETIRED from the P7 dedicated-server role (2026-07-12) - it was memory-exhausted (host 30GB ~97% + swap full; cgroup oom_kill=9), the root of every P7 'clip', now superseded by the GCP VM. Still fine for lighter local-lab work. If ever rejoined: DISARMED observe-only baseline on 0.5.18. UDP 2456-2457 | ComfyEra16 | container comfy-valheim-server-am4-valheim-server-1.

infra.detail: native Valheim + ComfyNetworkSense from the latest tree build in plugins (the csproj CopyAssembly lane auto-copies every mod build; dev-HEAD build as of 2026-07-18 - release cuts no longer auto-copy, comfy 877ff11) | routeGodFlySafeguard on | account floooooobcakes / persona wary.fool / character Durracktu, SteamID 76561198088711642 (NOT the waryfool/Zephar410 dota2 smurf; floooooobcakes is the ACCOUNT name, not a character) | coupleAutoRehearsalToNetcodeProbe ON | zdoInjectionEnabled toggled per window, off at rest (quit/relaunch clears the client-only synthetic ZDO) | NB: auto-walk re-arms only on a fresh RELAUNCH (AutoRehearsalRunOncePerSession), not a menu rejoin | teleport-route.tsv supports an optional Y column for above-canopy floats

infra.name: comfy-gateway :8720
infra.detail: CONTAINERIZED on :8720 (healthz green) - runtime evidence (2026-07-13) corrects the earlier 'native' claim: the live instance is the Docker Desktop container comfy-valheim-lab-comfy-gateway-1 from the compose fieldlab/autonomous/valheim-lab.compose.yml (its Python is BAKED into the image, only var/ + state/ are bind-mounts). Because it is containerized, Ollama on the Windows host is NOT at the container's 127.0.0.1 - reach it via COMFY_OLLAMA=http://host.docker.internal:11434 (set in the compose 2026-07-13; local_generate + valheim_mcp_health both read it). The native fieldlab/scripts/start-comfy-gateway.ps1 is an ALTERNATE launch that binds 127.0.0.1:8720 and cannot co-bind while the container holds the port. Background-fragile either way; a fresh instance runs the CURRENT code (stale-instance trap defeated, verified over MCP). 27 valheim tools incl. valheim_loopback_preflight (P7/I7 full-stack composition preflight: door + Lumberjacks handshake/injection staging + am4 baseline/keys/version + OMEN injection surface; staging detection hardened against the default-window false-positive). Full P4/P5/P6 toolsurface live. Endpoints http://127.0.0.1:4000 (OMEN) / http://100.124.12.37:4000 (am4 tailnet).

infra.name: Lumberjacks gateway :4000/:4005
infra.detail: PRODUCTION gateway runs on P7 (stopped with the VM). The OMEN-local instance is torn down between sessions and its windows are in-memory; the window drivers rebuild Release from source and re-stage just-in-time (0.0.0.0:4000 bind required - appsettings defaults to localhost-only). Reachable from containers over tailnet when up.

infra.detail: am4 llvmpipe client container removed + decoy cfg deleted (P1.13 done); only OMEN docker-desktop compose teardown queued for next engine start

Server (via run-netcode-probe-cycle.ps1 -SkipDeploy, archived): recv calls=1642 zdos=29944, send SendZDOs=2247/CreateSyncList=2247 zdos=605, both legible 50/50, parseErr=0. sendzdos_not_inlined: PASS. SendZDOs postfix calls=2247 (server) / 2288 (client) - the postfix hook fires for real in both directions. SendZDOs is directly patchable; the inlining risk that was open since I0 is retired.
verify-netcode-probe.ps1 STATUS=pass_i1_reachable, archived to fieldlab/runs/i1-airtight/20260709-224834/

Signed server baseline packet runs/i1-airtight/20260710-p2baseline-server/ (validate-run-packet PASS, 4 gates). 1128 heartbeat pulses/29.1min, heartbeat-gap p95 0.53s, msgs 4.1/s; perf hitches 4 (3 severe = ~49s boot world-load on 9.15M ZDOs, not live degradation); netcode funnel recv 2126calls/60290zdos, SendZDOs 2249, parseErr 0. rtt/jitter excluded (bogus metric).

Signed client baseline packet runs/i1-airtight/20260710-p2baseline-client/ (validate-run-packet PASS, 5 gates). 6301 samples/53.1min session c79bed52 (mod 0.5.8): fps avg 60.4/bench 60.97, frame-time p95 16.67ms, HIGH tier 6/6, 0 corrections, 12 hitches/1 severe (load-boundary). rtt/jitter recorded as _UNRELIABLE, no gate.

Second green run. Verifier STATUS=pass_i1_reachable, archived runs/i1-airtight/20260709-233543-p2-repeat/. Server recv 2126calls/60290zdos, SendZDOs=2249=CreateSyncList=2249, parseErr=0; Client(0.5.8) recv 19/438, SendZDOs=2285/CreateSyncList=2282, parseErr=0. Both counters_are_authoritative w/ sha256+lifecycle. Reproduces the step-6 shape.

Full process restart+reconnect: Derek exited to desktop, relaunched (client 0.5.7->0.5.8), am4 restarted its 9.15M-ZDO world (Game server connected 23:30:44); rejoined wary.fool 23:32:37, world+character intact, probes+autopilot ran clean to 150s autostop.
(OPTIONAL, deferred) 2-seat capture: waryfool/Zephar410 on the i5 for a 2-peer baseline. Not required for the P2 gate; available on demand.

Perf-era A/B methodology reconciled vs the connected baseline: era-banners updated in handoffs/HANDOFF-PERF-TEST-AB-CHECKLIST.md + NETWORKSENSE-PERF-DEBUG-PLAN.md with packet pointers. Verdict: H1(load)+H5(save/quit) confirmed, H2/H3/H4 ruled out for steady state (all severe hitches are boot/load-boundary; steady state clean).
Committed + dashboard republished; P2 phase row green.

am4 env CROSSPLAY=false + SERVER_PUBLIC=false; boot log 'Opened Steam server'+'Game server connected', NO 'Opened PlayFab server'. PlayFab-login line is registry auth, not crossplay (ZNet:344-350). Archived evidence/i6-steam-only.md.

Client joined via IP:port 100.116.82.60:2456 -> ZSteamSocket path (ZNet:650/655 Connect(new ZSteamSocket(host))); PlayFab connect needs a join-code/m_serverPlayFabPlayerId (ZNet:385-386), never used. Peer socket = ZSteamSocket. Ladder I6 satisfied. Optional runtime socket assertion folded into the P3 observer slice.

Pin mechanism extracted DIRECTLY from the live decompiled assembly_valheim.dll (ReleaseNearbyZDOS@623, RPC_ZDOData@792, ZDO.SetOwner@1510, SetOwnerInternal@1519, Save@1001/Load@1345 bodies all confirmed) and recorded in NETCODE-OWNERSHIP-MAP.md with 2 source corrections. Primary-source extraction supersedes a HEARTH doc-extract (post-i0-distrust-rule prefers primary sources).
NETCODE-OWNERSHIP-MAP.md records the pin design; SetOwner/SetOwnerInternal signatures re-confirmed vs live assembly_valheim.dll (ZDO:1510/1519, both public/patchable). Observe-first slice approved.

OwnershipPinRunner + OwnershipPinPatches built (mod 0.5.10, clean build 0 warnings). Two scoped Harmony prefixes return false to skip the vanilla owner change: ZDO.SetOwner gated to ReleaseNearbyZDOS scope (release@640 + reseize@645), ZDO.SetOwnerInternal gated to RPC_ZDOData scope (caveat #2 remote-apply). Auto-captures <=25 owned ZDOs; uncaptured = negative control. Rollback: ownershipPinEnabled=false. Priority.Last keeps the observe prefix ordered first. Attach-verified on am4 (Awake ready past CreateAndPatchAll). Never writes synthetic owners -> save-safe.

MCP tools valheim_ownership_pin_status + valheim_tail_ownership_pin built + unit-tested (gate=held_with_negative_control on a synthetic authoritative window; floor case correctly flagged non-authoritative). Splits holds by funnel (SetOwner vs SetOwnerInternal), exposes held_owner_ids + provenance (host/sha256/size/age). Loads on next gateway start. Registered in get_tools + valheim_mcp_health.

steps.t: Deploy pin to am4 (server-side); OMEN client unchanged
steps.g: am4: mod 0.5.10 deployed to bepinex/plugins (ROOT cfg, never decoy), boot log 'Loading [ComfyNetworkSense 0.5.10]' + 'Telemetry scaffold ready', pin+observe armed. OMEN stays 0.5.8 by design - the pin is server-side (ReleaseZDOS runs only if IsServer), so the client just needs to join and walk (auto-rehearsal coupling already on 0.5.8).
wary.fool/OMEN join (10:52Z) -> coupled probe+observe+pin window; the hands-free auto-rehearsal walk churned 263+ ownership changes on zone entry, capturing the trigger with no human driving.

steps.t: GATE: owner stays pinned across trigger
steps.g: PASS (authoritative, gate=held_with_negative_control). 25 ZDOs pinned (cap; 3 prefabs, 7 sectors, 2 held owners); 55 ownership changes HELD - 34 via SetOwner (ReleaseNearbyZDOS release/reseize funnel) + 21 via SetOwnerInternal (RPC_ZDOData remote-apply funnel). Owner held constant on both funnels. evidence/i2-pin/ sha256 ebeefeb6.

PASS. The pin ALLOWED 262 pass-through transfers on uncaptured ZDOs; the observe seam independently logged 262 via_internal + 1 via_setowner transitions on different (unpinned) ZDOs the same window. Vanilla ownership transfer intact for everything not captured - the built-in live negative control.

steps.t: HARD GATE: save integrity on quit->reload
steps.g: PASS. A full world save+reload occurred WHILE the pin held 25 ZDOs (mid-run idle-restart 10:44Z); reloaded world matches the clean pre-pin baseline exactly (portals 4472 / spawned 85439 / targets 20255 / locations 18004 all exact; ZDOS 9.1556M within tolerance). Confirms ZDO ownership is runtime-only (Load resets owner=0, Save never writes it) -> the pin writes nothing persisted and cannot corrupt the save.

Two independent joins both engaged + held: window 1 (10:43Z, 234 holds, cut short by the routine UPDATE_IF_IDLE save+restart = corroborating floor, no clean stop) + window 2 (10:52Z, 55 holds, authoritative PASS). Mechanism reproduced across both. A 2nd clean authoritative run is available on demand (one join into a window clear of the ~30-min idle-restart boundary).

Evidence archived to fieldlab/evidence/i2-pin/ (ownership-pin.jsonl sha256 ebeefeb6 + ownership-churn.jsonl sha256 816d7630 + ANALYSIS.md), save-integrity PASS captured, map + dashboard updated, committed.

steps.t: Lumberjacks gateway up, am4-container reachability proven

POST /valheim/zdo-redirect/receipts + GET status[/window] + POST reset live (ValheimZdoRedirectService/-Endpoints, singleton ConcurrentDictionary pattern). Smoke-tested with a deliberate seq gap + duplicate: receipts=4, distinct_seq=3, duplicates=1, max_seq=4, missing_seq=1 - exact. 400s on malformed input.

Built clean 0 warnings. Prefab-allowlist tag scheme (EMPTY REFUSES - fail-safe, opposite of the pin's blank=any); server-only guard; reflection ack via AccessTools.Inner (refuses to arm if handles missing); redirect-send.jsonl local count-of-record; batched retry-safe POSTs (gateway gates on distinct seq, so retries can only inflate duplicates, never the gate number); zdoRedirectActiveSeconds=90 auto-disarm = in-window rollback rehearsal.

Contract NETCODE-HANDSHAKE-CONTRACT.md/.json (comfy 56e5178): Funnel 5 formalized field-by-field + ordered gate (36->Err3 / blacklist->8 / ticket->8 / full(>=10)->9 / password->6 / dup->7). TWO decompile sources agree (I0 map + fresh ZNet re-decompile, build 0.221.12, Version.m_networkVersion=36u); full ConnectionStatus enum captured + literal max-players 10 (the c_NetworkVersionMaxPlayerCount=35 const is a catalogued red herring).

ValheimHandshakeService (Lumberjacks 935095b): logical responder - ServerHandshake=>ClientHandshake(needPassword,salt); PeerInfo=>ordered gate then accept+server-PeerInfo or reject+ConnectionStatus code. Mod owns ZPackage bytes, gateway owns logic (I3/I4 precedent). Built clean, DI-wired, endpoints /valheim/handshake/{config,begin,peerinfo,status,reset} live.

ValheimHandshakeServiceTests + run-handshake-loopback.py: no-game proof - happy path->logical steady-state, full ordered failure battery (BOTH code-8 cases distinct), earliest-failure ordering, accept-then-dup, pre-0.214.301 version shim, malformed fail-closed. xUnit full suite 28/28; HTTP loopback green vs the live rebuilt gateway. Evidence evidence/i5-handshake/ sha256 d705e346.

steps.t: MCP: handshake trace tail + one-call gate
steps.g: valheim_handshake_trace + valheim_handshake_gate (comfy 56e5178): verdict handshake_satisfied requires a logical steady-state accept AND all six DISTINCT gate-check labels (distinguishes blacklist vs ticket, both code 8, which a codes-only check merges); reports scope=logical_headless_no_live_addpeer. Registered in get_tools+valheim_mcp_health; returned handshake_satisfied vs the live loopback window. NB running :8720 needs a restart to expose over MCP (verified via direct import; stale-instance trap).

DONE 2026-07-11 - interceptor built + wire-validated live (0.5.18). The RPC_PeerInfo Harmony prefix (HandshakeResponderRunner + HandshakeResponderPatches) reads a SetPos(0) PeerInfo clone, decodes the logical fields, does a synchronous Lumberjacks /valheim/handshake/peerinfo decision over raw TcpClient (Mono trap), and on reject Invoke(Error,code)+skip vanilla / on accept returns to vanilla for the real AddPeer. Fail-open on any fault. Self-arms server-side (handshake fires at connect, before any probe window). Password (F) + steam-ticket (C) gates delegated to vanilla (real crypto stays in-game per the contract); Lumberjacks fronts version/blacklist/full/duplicate. First armed build 0.5.17 mis-staged an accept-all context vs am4's real SERVER_PASS (3x code-6 rejects); 0.5.18 delegated the password and produced the clean accept. Decoded real bytes correctly (uid/net_version=36/player). PRIOR (2026-07-10): config surface handshakeResponder* (enabled/endpoint/windowId/poll/active) added + mod built clean 0.5.16 (UNARMED; empty endpoint refuses to arm). Architecture RESOLVED + recorded (worklog I5 block): am4 mod-mediation is the only faithful 'Lumberjacks-fronted' reading (ZSteamSocket can't be HTTP-terminated) - hooks RPC_ServerHandshake@727 + RPC_PeerInfo@818, reads a PeerInfo CLONE (SetPos(0), banked i4 lesson), polls Lumberjacks context via raw TcpClient (server Mono trap, ADR 0003). REMAINING: the RPC interceptor itself is built + wire-validated at the ARMED session (first real-client bytes in-game), not blind (per Derek 2026-07-10). No transport shim needed. Commit mod 90ff17d. PREFLIGHT ADDED 2026-07-11: a read-only one-call gate valheim_handshake_preflight (comfy) verifies the physical armed-window preconditions live - door + Lumberjacks reachable + am4 disarmed observe-only baseline + am4 mod-version + OMEN client - and returned preconditions_ready / ready_to_begin_armed_window=true; window_steps_remaining enumerates the armed-session actions still owed. AM4 DEPLOY DONE 2026-07-11: 0.5.16 built clean (0 warnings, FileVersion 0.5.16) + deployed UNARMED to am4 (scp md5 2947ae50; boot verified Loading [ComfyNetworkSense 0.5.16] -> Game server connected 07:31:04Z; save-integrity PASS across the restart), config surface confirmed server-side (all 5 handshakeResponder* keys written, handshakeResponderEnabled=false). Preflight now preconditions_ready with only 2 armed-session steps left (stage a fronted Lumberjacks window + arm/wire-validate the RPC_ServerHandshake/RPC_PeerInfo interceptor in-game). OMEN client stays 0.5.15 (the handshake responder is am4-server-side only; benign version skew).

PASS. 01:22:22 ACCEPT (Lumberjacks-decided, net_version=36) -> 'Server: New peer connected' -> 01:22:36 'Got character ZDOID from Durracktu' (in-world past spawn) -> held to 01:24:07 = ~105s, through a death+respawn (char ZDOID 1167002880:1 -> 0:0 -> :10), 0 disconnects. Real vanilla AddPeer via the accept path. Evidence evidence/i5-handshake-live/am4-server-log-decisions.txt (sha256 943f2dc2).

PASS (live for 2 of 6 codes; full battery proven headless 28/28). 01:28:44 REJECT code=8 check=blacklist (same client + same am4 with NO server-side ban -> admission provably Lumberjacks-decided; client 'Banned' dialog). Code 6 (password) surfaced live too (01:12, the pre-fix misconfig). version(3)/full(9)/duplicate(7)/ticket(8) not driven live - covered by the loopback battery. Password + ticket are delegated to vanilla (real crypto).
